The Kingdom of Eldoria
← Back to Aric Veyron Lore Details
Lore Entry

Ancient Prophecy

Foreshadows the rise of a king who would unite the fractured realms — inscribed on the walls of the Iron Throne before the Shadow War.

The Prophecy of Eldenor

When shadow falls upon the northern watch and the crown lies empty, a child of two bloodlines shall rise. Neither wholly of the old house nor the new, they shall forge unity from betrayal and bind the realms with wisdom sharper than any blade.

The prophecy is linked to Aric Veyron's coronation and foreshadows the events of The Shadow War. Scholars debate whether the "child of two bloodlines" refers to Aric's mixed heritage between House Veyron and the northern clans.

Connected Entities
Aric Veyron The Shadow War The Iron Throne Kingdom of Eldenor
Lore
Ancient Prophecy

First recorded: 980 AR
Status: Active foreshadowing
Arc: Rise of Eldenor
